title: Cards View Widget: option to show Board name and Group name on card
excerpt: The widget > Cards View does not have an option to select the Board name and the Group name to display on the card. Use case is: setting up a “high level view” of who is currently working on what. The Card View is workin…

posts.author: koconnell (Kris O'Connell)
posts.cookedHtml: The widget > Cards View does not have an option to select the Board name and the Group name to display on the card. Use case is: setting up a “high level view” of who is currently working on what. The Card View is working well for the purpose, but at a glance [without having to click for more details or filter by boards] it is hard to tell what Board the item is related to. And we have similar items across all boards [like many do] so it would be helpful to see at the top of the card: Board Name - Group Name - Item name.
